meta.title: Vanisca — Mediterranean Restaurant in Agadir
meta.description: Restaurant in Agadir: fresh pasta, seafood, pizza, risotto and Mediterranean cuisine. Book your table.
meta.keywords: Agadir restaurant, Mediterranean restaurant Agadir, seafood Agadir, pasta Agadir, pizza Agadir, Vanisca, book restaurant Agadir

hero.title: Welcome to Vanisca
hero.subtitle: Fresh pasta, seafood, pizza and Mediterranean cuisine, in Agadir.

about.title: Mediterranean cuisine in Agadir
about.body: Vanisca welcomes you in Agadir with a Mediterranean menu: starters, pasta, risotto, pizza, meat, fish and desserts. Book your table or contact us for any request.

highlights.title: Our signatures
highlights.subtitle: A few must-tries from our menu

seafood.title: Seafood
seafood.desc: Prawns, calamari, octopus and fish grilled to perfection.

pasta.title: Pasta & Risotto
pasta.desc: Fresh pasta and creamy risottos with truffle and seafood.

pizza.title: Pizzas
pizza.desc: Thin crust and generous toppings, baked with care.

desserts.title: Desserts
desserts.desc: Tiramisu, San Sebastián cheesecake and indulgent fondants.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A generous, seasonal Mediterranean carte
menu.downloadNote: Prices are shown in Moroccan dirhams (DH).

reservation.title: Reserve your table
reservation.subtitle: Book in just a moment. We'll confirm shortly.

success.title: Reservation sent!
success.body: Thank you. We've received your request and will get back to you very soon to confirm.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Your reservation could not be sent. Please try again or contact us directly by phone or WhatsApp.

validation.phoneRequired: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.guestsRequired: Please enter the number of guests.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us and we'll reply quickly.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
contact.error: Sending failed. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
